assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of 24-month support lifecycle and reduced upgrade frequency compared to other channels

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and explains this blocks disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures weekend maintenance window with --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' and explains alignment with training gaps

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Implements dual node pool strategy with separate training-pool (H100 GPUs) and system-pool, with detailed configuration for each

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Sets --enable-autoupgrade=false on training pool and provides detailed quarterly maintenance planning with manual upgrade commands during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Provides comprehensive checkpoint strategy including SIGTERM handling, terminationGracePeriodSeconds configuration, and training script integration with checkpoint saving

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes detailed GPU driver version management section with staging cluster creation, CUDA compatibility testing, and validation procedures before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions GPUDirect requirements with specific version requirement (1.27.7-gke.1121000+) and includes high-MTU VPC configuration for RDMA traffic
